signals.headline: Kon Knueppel Emerges as NBA Rookie of the Year Favorite Over Cooper Flagg** | YES | HIGH confidence[3]

signals.headline: Ethereum Foundation Stakes 70,000 ETH ($143M), Easing Sell Pressure Amid Recovery Signals | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Stakes 70,000 ETH ($143M), Easing Sell Pressure Amid Recovery Signals | YES | MED confidence**  
The Ethereum Foundation's staking reduces supply pressure, supporting ETH's rebound to $2,184 with bullish patterns, RSI near oversold, and converging moving averages at $2,126.[1][5] Technical analyses highlight a potential 170% rally to $8,500, mirroring 2021 patterns after bottom
